entities.name: SYNTHETIC FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Chemical substances used to provide nutrients to plants, often having adverse environmental effects

entities.name: PESTICIDES
entities.description: Chemical substances used to kill pests, often having adverse environmental effects

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of agricultural production per unit area

entities.name: ENVIRONMENT
entities.description: The natural world, including air, water, and land, affected by agricultural practices

entities.name: MICROBIAL HABITAT
entities.description: The natural environment where soil microorganisms reside

entities.name: HUMAN HEALTH
entities.description: The physical and mental well-being of humans, potentially impacted by synthetic chemicals

entities.name: SOIL MICROBIOTA
entities.description: The collective community of microorganisms living in the soil

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for food or other purposes

entities.name: SOIL MICROBES
entities.description: Microscopic organisms found in the soil that interact with plant roots

entities.name: ROOT EXUDATES
entities.description: Chemicals secreted by plant roots into the rhizosphere

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of enhancing the quality or yield of crops through various methods

entities.name: MICROBIAL CONSORTIUM
entities.description: A group of different microbial species working together

entities.name: BACTERIA
entities.description: Single-celled prokaryotic microorganisms

entities.name: ALGAE
entities.description: Photosynthetic organisms found in soil and water

entities.name: FUNGI
entities.description: Eukaryotic organisms including yeasts and molds

entities.name: PROTOZOA
entities.description: Single-celled eukaryotic organisms

entities.name: BIO-STIMULANTS
entities.description: Substances or microorganisms applied to plants to enhance nutrient uptake and growth

entities.name: GENOME EDITING
entities.description: A technique used to make precise changes to the DNA of an organism

entities.name: BIOENERGY
entities.description: Energy produced from biological sources

entities.name: BIO-FERTILIZERS
entities.description: Fertilizers containing living microorganisms that enhance soil fertility
